holdings.infoBox: FEDM is an equity ETF with a total of 236 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 3.49%, Royal Bank of Canada at 1.95%, Siemens Aktiengesellschaft at 1.58%, Novartis AG at 1.55%, and Shell at 1.54%.

overview.description: The FlexShares ESG & Climate Developed Markets ex-US Core Index Fund (FEDM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks a principles-based index of large-cap companies from the developed markets outside the US that exhibit environmental, social, and corporate governance (ESG) characteristics. FEDM was launched on Sep 20, 2021 and is issued by FlexShares.
infoTable: Northern Trust ESG & Climate Developed Markets ex-US Core Index
